LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Choir_Desc: Consumes one choir engine sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and opens a disciplined support breach only after the first boss has already been cleared. The Choir Engine is not a raw damage monster; it amplifies escorts, floods defenders with targeting noise, suppresses turrets, and turns a stable firing line into a command-jammed kill zone.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Choir_Rewards: • Post-first-boss progression checkpoint with real pressure instead of tutorial pacing • Guaranteed Herald Core Fragment recovery plus heavier residue payout • Teaches anti-support target priority before later boss escalation
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Choir_SideEffects: • Escorts are actively buffed while the engine remains online • Nearby defenders and turrets suffer repeated signal interference and EMP suppression • Periodic choir pulses strengthen the whole breach package instead of relying on direct boss damage
LanguageData.ABY_ChoirSummonSuccessDesc: The command wafer has taken. A Choir Engine relay node is crossing into local space with a disciplined escort screen.
